# Lie of the Land

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Spirit

*Condition.*

---

Attach to a location.
**Action**: Exhaust a **_Scout_** character to place 1 progress on attached location. If that location is not explored by this effect, you may attach Lie of the Land to another location.

---
